verdict: An incredibly well-synced and rhythmic chart that captures the song's energy perfectly, but is slightly held back by awkward three-panel 'hand' holds and taps.

issues.problem: Requires holding Down and Right while tapping Up, forcing an awkward bracket or hand hit.
Creates a triple-active hold (Up, Right, Down) which requires a hand on the pad, disrupting feet-only play.
Tapping Right then Left while holding Up forces a highly uncomfortable crossover or double-step.
Requires tapping Up while holding Left and Right, creating another awkward three-panel interaction.
